description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a generous scattering of white sesame seeds on top. The interior reveals a thick beef patty, a slice of melted cheddar cheese, crisp shredded lettuce, and a dollop of creamy mayonnaise, with a hint of ketchup and possibly a tomato slice peeking out. The toppings are layered unevenly, with lettuce and cheese protruding from the sides, giving it a hearty, overstuffed appearance. The hamburger is served on a white disposable plate with colored markings along the rim, suggesting a casual, takeout or picnic setting. The bun appears soft and slightly glossy, while the patty and toppings add texture and color contrast. The overall presentation is appetizing and typical of a classic American cheeseburger.
description: A classic cheeseburger with a sesame seed bun, beef patty, cheddar cheese, lettuce, and sauces, served on a white disposable plate with colored markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sesame seed bun, lettuce, cheese, and patty with mayonnaise and ketchup visible, plate has a pink marking.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the lettuce and cheese spilling out, with an orange marking on the plate rim.
description_view_2: Another side view with more visible lettuce and cheese, and a green marking on the plate.
description_view_3: Rear view shows more sauce and toppings, with a pink and green marking on the plate rim.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and cheese are layered directly on top of the patty, with mayonnaise and ketchup spread unevenly above, and toppings protruding from the sides for a casual, overflowing look.
